allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from stable_audio_tools import get_pretrained_model; model, config = get_pretrained_model\('stabilityai/stable-audio-open-1.0'\); transformer = model.model.model.transformer; print\('transformer type:', type\(transformer\).__name__\); print\('num layers:', len\(transformer.layers\)\); print\('dim:', getattr\(transformer, 'dim', 'N/A'\)\); print\('dim_in:', getattr\(transformer, 'project_in', None\).in_features if hasattr\(transformer, 'project_in'\) else 'N/A'\); print\('dim_out:', getattr\(transformer, 'project_out', None\).out_features if hasattr\(transformer, 'project_out'\) else 'N/A'\)")
